entry.title: How to Improve Your Writing: Data-Driven Tips | enhio.com
entry.summary: Evidence-based writing tips that measurably improve clarity, engagement, and readability. Backed by research in linguistics and content analysis.

entry.title: Readability Scores Explained: What They Mean and Why They Matter | enhio.com
entry.summary: A clear explanation of Flesch-Kincaid, Flesch Reading Ease, and other readability formulas. How they work, their limitations, and how to use them effectively.
